message.content: Look at the latest screenshot in ~/Screenshots and tell me if the paste flow worked.

content.thinking: User wants me to inspect the most recent screenshot. I'll use ls -t to find the newest one, then Read it.

content.text: On it — let me grab the newest screenshot.

Yes — paste worked. The Message box shows `[image: /tmp/upload-9e3f2a.png]` appended after your typed text, and the daemon's `/api/uploads/send` logged a 200 with the verify-retry succeeding on the first attempt.

The whole roundtrip on a real phone (Pixel 7 → Tailscale → daemon → tmux paste-buffer) took ~280 ms. That's the slowest path I've seen; it'll feel snappy on a laptop.

message.content: Good. Can you add a smoke test for it?

content.text: Sketching it now — Playwright drives the page through paste → verify the `` preview renders → tap Send → assert the daemon's `/api/uploads/send` returned 200 and the staged file is gone from `~/.cache/ttyview/uploads/`. Will commit under `tests/e2e/image-paste.spec.ts`.
